calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Jonathna Vaknim, Esq., Scecially appearing for Counsel for Plaintif;
No Appareance by Pro Per Defendant/Judgment Debtor, Quintin V. Castillor

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is taken under submission

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

*Order signed after hearing

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Continued To Dec-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. STEVE LEVY, Esq. (Tel: 626-844-8821) appearing for judgment creditor Unifund CCR Partners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING ON DETERMINATION OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Judgment debtor Quintin Castillo is not present.

The Court inquires as to the judgment debtor's indicated monthly expenses as the Court's Claim of Exemption packet omits that information.

The Court instructs counsel to meet and confer with the judgment debtor to attempt to work out a payment plan.

The Court continues this matter to December 17, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court instructs counsel to provide notice to the judgment debtor f the continued hearing date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alisa J. Kim, Esq., 510.736.6293, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF QUINTIN V. CASTILLO is granted. The Court orders the San Francisco Sheriff's Department to withhold $100.00 per pay period towards payment of the judgment. Order is signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, ESQ., Tel No. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor Unifund CCR Partners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court finds Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor did not properly notify parties of its intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling at hearing. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, Mr. Castillo's claim of exemption is granted. He has shown that he needs all of his earnings to support himself. Court shall prepare and mail out a formal order to parties and the levying officer. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
